bottom_line: Tighten S16 qv-browser guardrails (selector strategy, command hygiene, and session checks) to remove the biggest retry hotspot.
coverage_notes: DB telemetry available via iw item-status. Reviewed all step reports S01-S16. Log sizes were all <1 MB, so no large-file sampling was required; focused deep reads on S08, S15, and S16 run/fix logs where retries occurred.

findings.title: Browser verification thrash from brittle Playwright interaction patterns
findings.recommendation: Require resilient role/text selectors, explicit enablement waits, and a snapshot-refresh fallback path in qv-browser execution guidance.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00086_S16_run1.log:189 - Error: locator.fill: Error: Element is not an <input>, <textarea> or [contenteditable] element

findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Harden qv-browser execution guidance with robust selector and retry patterns to reduce S16 thrash; evidence in ai-dev/active/F-00086/reports/F-00086_self_assess_report.md. Target file: skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md. Effort: M.

findings.title: Fix-cycle execution context drift caused misleading import failures
findings.recommendation: Add mandatory fix-cycle preflight checks for working directory and import resolution before running test commands.
